title: exchange partition incorrectly report `Found a row that does not match the partition`
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE di_tidb_wzp_test_v2 (a1 int(11) not null, a2 int(11) not null, a3 date default null, a4 varchar(255), primary key (a1, a2)) PARTITION BY RANGE (a1) (PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (10), PARTITION p2 VALUES LESS THAN (20), PARTITION p3 VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE));
CREATE TABLE di_tidb_wzp_test_np_v2 (a1 int(11) not null, a2 int(11) not null, a3 date default null, a4 varchar(255), primary key (a1, a2));
key_bug_features: exchange partition with non-matching row values
